traffic_volume.status: Required for Cloudflare Verified Bot status

consent_protocols.implicit_consent: Limited to public technical headers assessment

cookies_tracking.no_cookie_storage: Stateless scanning. No Set-Cookie headers are persisted or shared between sessions.
cookies_tracking.no_fingerprinting: Zero execution of fingerprinting or tracking scripts.
cookies_tracking.session_policy: Clean slate for every page request.

security_audit.tls_inspection: Encryption audit only (TLS version, certificate validity). No interception of encrypted payloads.
security_audit.vulnerability_scan: Limited to publicly visible headers and HTML indicators.

data_processing.pii_policy: Automatic masking/exclusion. Zero storage of emails, phones, or form data.
data_processing.minimization: Collection limited to technical metadata and compliance markers.
data_processing.legal_basis: Legitimate Interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) for cybersecurity and legal compliance monitoring.
